summary: Completed both backend and frontend testing for Trama Viva APS. All 13 backend pytest tests pass (API root, GET /events, GET /events/{id}, POST /event-signup, /membership, /contact with success + validation). All frontend flows pass: navbar, hero CTAs with scroll, 4 activity cards, 6 event cards, event modal opens and submits with success toast, iscrizione success block renders, contact success toast renders, footer contains @tramavivaaps and tramavivaaps@gmail.com, mobile nav toggle opens menu. Zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan context manager.
Minor: CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which is not a safe combination in production; restrict CORS_ORIGINS env var for prod.
Note: testids in Navbar are 'nav-mobile-toggle'/'nav-mobile-menu' (not 'navbar-mobile-*'); review_request hint slightly mismatched but implementation is consistent.
seed_data_creation: Created via tests: event_signups, memberships, contacts docs prefixed with TEST_
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs cleanly (13 passed). Navbar mobile testids are nav-mobile-toggle and nav-mobile-menu. Toast success messages: 'Richiesta inviata! Ti scriviamo presto.' (event), 'Messaggio inviato. Grazie!' (contact). Iscrizione shows [data-testid=iscrizione-success] block on submit.
